messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Build a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Series B Pitch Deck' targeting potential investors for our tech startup. The presentation requires 15 slides utilizing a creative dark mode theme with neon accents. Use English for the content and configure the slide size to 16:9 Widescreen orientation. Save the final document as series_b_pitch.pptx. External APIs or web scraping are strictly forbidden. When adding charts, you must use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Also, ensure that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = 10.0
SLIDE_HEIGHT = 5.625

BG_DARK = "#0a0a0f"
BG_CARD = "#12121a"
BG_ACCENT = "#1a1a2e"
NEON_CYAN = "#00d4ff"
NEON_MAGENTA = "#ff00aa"
NEON_GREEN = "#00ff88"
NEON_PURPLE = "#a855f7"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Calibri"

MARGIN_LEFT = 0.5
MARGIN_RIGHT = 0.5
CARD_WIDTH = 2.8
CARD_HEIGHT = 1.2
CARD_GAP = 0.3


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=BG_DARK):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color_hex="#ffffff", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", accent_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BG_CARD)
    if accent_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#333344")
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.1), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff")
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.45), width - Inches(0.3), height - Inches(0.55), body, font_size=11, color_hex="#b0b0c0")

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, label_text, accent_color=NEON_CYAN):
    box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, Inches(0.08), Inches(0.6))
    box.fill.solid()
    box.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    box.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.25), top - Inches(0.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.8), label_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff")


def add_footer(slide, slide_number, total_slides=15):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 0.25), Inches(3), Inches(0.2), f"Series B Pitch Deck", font_size=9, color_hex="#444466")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - 1.5), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 0.25), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.2), f"{slide_number} / {total_slides}", font_size=9, color_hex="#444466", alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BG_ACCENT)
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#333344")
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)


def create_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    accent_line_left = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.04), Inches(1.8))
    accent_line_left.fill.solid()
    accent_line_left.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NEON_CYAN)
    accent_line_left.line.fill.background()

    accent_line_right = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(7.46), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.04), Inches(1.8))
    accent_line_right.fill.solid()
    accent_line_right.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NEON_MAGENTA)
    accent_line_right.line.fill.background()

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Series B Pitch Deck"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(48)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(5), Inches(0.5), "NEXUS AI — Enterprise Analytics Platform", font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex="#b0b0c0", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(5), Inches(0.4), "Confidential — For Qualified Investors Only", font_size=12, color_hex="#666688", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def create_problem_statement_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "The Problem"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Enterprise analytics platforms are failing to meet modern business needs", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    add_card(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, "Pain Point #1", "Legacy systems cost enterprises $2.4B annually in inefficiency and data silos", accent_color=NEON_MAGENTA)
    add_card(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, "Pain Point #2", "87% of companies report poor data quality due to fragmented tooling and manual processes", accent_color=NEON_MAGENTA)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def create_solution_overview_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Our Solution"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Nexus AI unifies enterprise analytics with intelligent automation", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    add_card(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + 0.3), Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, "AI-Powered Analytics", "Real-time insights powered by proprietary ML models that adapt to your data patterns", accent_color=NEON_CYAN)
    add_card(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_WIDTH / 2), Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, "Unified Data Platform", "Connect all data sources into a single semantic layer with zero ETL overhead", accent_color=NEON_GREEN)
    add_card(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH - 0.3), Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, "Automated Workflows", "Self-healing pipelines that detect anomalies and resolve issues before they impact users", accent_color=NEON_PURPLE)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def create_market_opportunity_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Market Opportunity"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "A rapidly expanding market with significant tailwinds", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    metrics = [
        ("$47B", "Total Addressable Market\nby 2027"),
        ("34%", "Annual Growth Rate (CAGR)"),
        ("12%", "Current Penetration Rate"),
        ("$5.6T", "Enterprise Data Spend\nGlobal Market")
    ]

    positions = [
        (Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.9)),
        (Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_GAP - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(1.9)),
        (Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(3.4)),
        (Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_GAP - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(3.4))
    ]

    for i, (metric, label) in enumerate(metrics):
        accent = [NEON_CYAN, NEON_MAGENTA, NEON_GREEN, NEON_PURPLE][i]
        add_card(slide, positions[i][0], positions[i][1], CARD_WIDTH + 0.4, Inches(1.3), "", "", accent_color=accent)
        add_text_box(slide, positions[i][0] + Inches(0.2), positions[i][1] + Inches(0.15), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), metric, font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, positions[i][0] + Inches(0.2), positions[i][1] + Inches(0.75), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(0.4), label, font_size=11, color_hex="#b0b0c0", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def create_product_features_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Product Features"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Comprehensive platform capabilities", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    features = [
        ("AI-Powered Analytics", "Proprietary ML models for predictive insights"),
        ("Real-Time Monitoring", "Sub-second data processing and visualization"),
        ("Automated Workflows", "Self-healing pipelines with anomaly detection"),
        ("Custom Integrations", "200+ native connectors to enterprise systems"),
        ("Advanced Reporting", "Drag-and-drop dashboard builder")
    ]

    top_row = [Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_GAP - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH)]
    bottom_row = [Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 + CARD_GAP)]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(features):
        if i < 3:
            x = top_row[i]
            y = Inches(1.9)
        else:
            idx = i - 3
            x = bottom_row[idx]
            y = Inches(3.4)

        accent = [NEON_CYAN, NEON_MAGENTA, NEON_GREEN, NEON_PURPLE, NEON_CYAN][i]
        add_card(slide, x, y, CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title, body, accent_color=accent)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def create_business_model_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Business Model"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Multiple revenue streams driving predictable growth", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    models = [
        ("SaaS Subscriptions", "$99/user/month\nTiered pricing for SMB to Enterprise", NEON_CYAN),
        ("Enterprise Licensing", "Annual contracts starting at $50K\nMulti-year commitments preferred", NEON_MAGENTA),
        ("Professional Services", "Implementation, training & consulting\nAverage engagement: $120K", NEON_GREEN)
    ]

    for i, (title, body, accent) in enumerate(models):
        x = Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + 0.3 + i * (CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP))
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title, body, accent_color=accent)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def create_traction_metrics_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Traction & Metrics"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Strong growth trajectory with improving unit economics", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    kpis = [
        ("47%", "MoM Revenue Growth"),
        ("284", "Active Enterprise Customers"),
        ("132%", "Net Dollar Retention Rate"),
        ("$156K", "Average Contract Value (ACV)")
    ]

    positions = [
        (Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.9)),
        (Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_GAP - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(1.9)),
        (Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(3.4)),
        (Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_GAP - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(3.4))
    ]

    for i, (metric, label) in enumerate(kpis):
        accent = [NEON_CYAN, NEON_GREEN, NEON_MAGENTA, NEON_PURPLE][i]
        add_card(slide, positions[i][0], positions[i][1], CARD_WIDTH + 0.4, Inches(1.3), "", "", accent_color=accent)
        add_text_box(slide, positions[i][0] + Inches(0.2), positions[i][1] + Inches(0.15), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), metric, font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, positions[i][0] + Inches(0.2), positions[i][1] + Inches(0.75), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(0.4), label, font_size=11, color_hex="#b0b0c0", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def create_competitive_landscape_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Competitive Landscape"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Clear differentiation in the enterprise analytics market", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    add_card(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH + 0.4, CARD_HEIGHT, "Nexus AI Advantages", "• Proprietary ML models\n• Unified data layer\n• Superior UX & adoption\n• 3x faster deployment", accent_color=NEON_CYAN)
    add_card(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH - 0.4), Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH + 0.4, CARD_HEIGHT, "Competitor Weaknesses", "• Legacy architecture\n• Poor integration\n• Complex setup (6+ months)\n• High total cost of ownership", accent_color=NEON_MAGENTA)

    add_card(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(3.4), CARD_WIDTH * 2 + CARD_GAP, Inches(1.0), "Market Differentiation: 99.9% Uptime SLA • Dedicated Customer Success • Open API Ecosystem", "", accent_color=NEON_GREEN)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def create_gtm_strategy_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Go-to-Market Strategy"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Multi-channel approach targeting enterprise decision makers", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    channels = [
        ("Inbound Marketing", "Content-led growth through SEO, thought leadership, and product-led content\nTarget: 40% of pipeline from organic sources"),
        ("Outbound Sales", "Enterprise account-based selling with dedicated AEs targeting Fortune 1000\nTarget: 35% of revenue from direct sales"),
        ("Channel Partnerships", "Strategic reseller and ISV partnerships with Microsoft, AWS, and Snowflake\nTarget: 25% of new logos through partners")
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(channels):
        accent = [NEON_CYAN, NEON_MAGENTA, NEON_GREEN][i]
        x = Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + 0.3 + i * (CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP))
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(2.8), title, body, accent_color=accent)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def create_financial_projections_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Financial Projections"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Path to profitability with strong unit economics", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    projections = [
        ("Revenue Growth", "$2M → $15M\nFY24 → FY29\nCAGR: 53%", NEON_CYAN),
        ("Gross Margin Expansion", "60% → 78%\nScale-driven efficiency gains", NEON_GREEN),
        ("EBITDA Trajectory", "-$3.5M → $4.2M\nProfitability by FY28", NEON_PURPLE)
    ]

    for i, (title, body, accent) in enumerate(projections):
        x = Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + 0.3 + i * (CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP))
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.9), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title, body, accent_color=accent)

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def create_team_introduction_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Leadership Team"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Experienced founders and operators from top-tier companies", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    team = [
        ("Sarah Chen", "CEO & Co-Founder", "Former VP of Product at Google Cloud\nStanford MBA"),
        ("David Park", "CTO & Co-Founder", "Ex-AWS Principal Engineer\nMIT Computer Science"),
        ("Maria Rodriguez", "VP of Sales", "Former Salesforce Director\n$50M+ quota attainment"),
        ("James Liu", "Head of Product", "Previously at Stripe, Head of Analytics\nUC Berkeley EECS")
    ]

    grid_positions = [
        (Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.9)),
        (Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(1.9)),
        (Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(3.4)),
        (Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(3.4))
    ]

    for i, (name, role, bio) in enumerate(team):
        accent = [NEON_CYAN, NEON_MAGENTA, NEON_GREEN, NEON_PURPLE][i]
        add_card(slide, grid_positions[i][0], grid_positions[i][1], CARD_WIDTH, Inches(1.3), name, f"{role}\n{bio}", accent_color=accent)

    add_footer(slide, 11)


def create_funding_ask_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Funding Ask"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Series B — Accelerating enterprise adoption", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.5), Inches(1.9), Inches(3), Inches(0.04))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NEON_CYAN)
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.1), Inches(5), Inches(1.0), "$50M", font_size=64, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.1), Inches(5), Inches(0.4), "Series B Round", font_size=24, bold=False, color_hex="#b0b0c0", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    details = [
        ("Pre-Money Valuation:", "$300M"),
        ("Target Close:", "Q2 2025"),
        ("Lead Investor:", "TBD — Open to strategic partners")
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(details):
        y = Inches(3.7 + i * 0.4)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.0), y, Inches(2), Inches(0.35), label, font_size=14, color_hex="#8888aa")
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.0), y, Inches(2.5), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff")

    add_footer(slide, 12)


def create_use_of_funds_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Use of Funds"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Strategic allocation to accelerate growth", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    allocations = [
        ("40%", "Product & R&D\nAI model development,\nnew feature launches"),
        ("30%", "Sales Expansion\nNew enterprise AEs,\ninternational hiring"),
        ("20%", "Marketing\nBrand awareness,\ncontent engine"),
        ("10%", "Working Capital\nOperations reserve")
    ]

    positions = [
        (Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.9)),
        (Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_GAP - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(1.9)),
        (Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(3.4)),
        (Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH / 2 - CARD_GAP - CARD_WIDTH), Inches(3.4))
    ]

    for i, (pct, desc) in enumerate(allocations):
        accent = [NEON_CYAN, NEON_MAGENTA, NEON_GREEN, NEON_PURPLE][i]
        add_card(slide, positions[i][0], positions[i][1], CARD_WIDTH + 0.4, Inches(1.3), "", "", accent_color=accent)
        add_text_box(slide, positions[i][0] + Inches(0.2), positions[i][1] + Inches(0.15), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), pct, font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, positions[i][0] + Inches(0.2), positions[i][1] + Inches(0.75), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(0.4), desc, font_size=11, color_hex="#b0b0c0", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 13)


def create_vision_roadmap_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Vision & Roadmap"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(36)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(0.5), "Strategic milestones driving long-term value creation", font_size=16, color_hex="#8888aa")

    roadmap = [
        ("Q4 2025", "Launch AI Copilot feature\nRelease Enterprise Tier"),
        ("Q1 2026", "Expand to APAC markets\nLaunch partner program"),
        ("Q2 2026", "Achieve SOC 2 Type II\nReach $20M ARR milestone"),
        ("Q4 2026", "Series C preparation\nInternational expansion")
    ]

    for i, (period, milestones) in enumerate(roadmap):
        y = Inches(1.9 + i * 0.95)
        accent = [NEON_CYAN, NEON_MAGENTA, NEON_GREEN, NEON_PURPLE][i]

        dot = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), y + Inches(0.2), Inches(0.15), Inches(0.15))
        dot.fill.solid()
        dot.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent)
        dot.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + 0.3), y, Inches(2), Inches(0.4), period, font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff")
        add_card(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + 0.5), y + Inches(0.35), CARD_WIDTH * 2 - 0.5, Inches(0.55), "", milestones)

    add_footer(slide, 14)


def create_contact_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    accent_line_top = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(3), Inches(0.04))
    accent_line_top.fill.solid()
    accent_line_top.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NEON_CYAN)
    accent_line_top.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(5), Inches(0.8), "NEXUS AI", font_size=48, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(5), Inches(0.4), "Building the Future of Enterprise Analytics", font_size=16, color_hex="#b0b0c0", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    accent_line_bottom = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.5), Inches(2.7), Inches(3), Inches(0.04))
    accent_line_bottom.fill.solid()
    accent_line_bottom.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NEON_MAGENTA)
    accent_line_bottom.line.fill.background()

    contacts = [
        ("Sarah Chen, CEO", "sarah.chen@nexusai.com"),
        ("David Park, CTO", "david.park@nexusai.com"),
        ("Investor Relations", "investors@nexusai.com")
    ]

    for i, (name, email) in enumerate(contacts):
        y = Inches(3.0 + i * 0.5)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), y, Inches(5), Inches(0.4), name, font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(5), Inches(0.3), email, font_size=14, color_hex="#8888aa", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 15)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH)
    prs.slide_height = Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT)

    create_title_slide(prs)
    create_problem_statement_slide(prs)
    create_solution_overview_slide(prs)
    create_market_opportunity_slide(prs)
    create_product_features_slide(prs)
    create_business_model_slide(prs)
    create_traction_metrics_slide(prs)
    create_competitive_landscape_slide(prs)
    create_gtm_strategy_slide(prs)
    create_financial_projections_slide(prs)
    create_team_introduction_slide(prs)
    create_funding_ask_slide(prs)
    create_use_of_funds_slide(prs)
    create_vision_roadmap_slide(prs)
    create_contact_slide(prs)

    prs.save("series_b_pitch.pptx")
    print("Presentation saved: series_b_pitch.pptx (15 slides)")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
